name: @kky42/pievo
description: Pievo daemon — runs on your machine, connects to a Pievo server, and executes scheduled loops via your local coding agent (Claude Code or Codex). One binary, two roles (daemon / loop callback).

scripts.build: node scripts/clean-dist.mjs && node scripts/sync-skill.mjs && node scripts/copy-runtime-assets.mjs && tsc
scripts.prepublishOnly: node scripts/clean-dist.mjs && node scripts/sync-skill.mjs && node scripts/copy-runtime-assets.mjs && tsc
